item.text:
## A. PolicyDenial constructors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/agent_loop.rs`: constructs and emits `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when `AgentLoop` blocks a tool call that is not in the allowlist.
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink` synthesizes and emits a loop-level `LoopAuditEvent::PolicyDenial` when it intercepts a disallowed `ToolCallRequested`.

## B. AuditSink implementors
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `NullSink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `InMemorySink`
- `crates/orbit-agent/src/loop_engine/audit/mod.rs`: `JsonlFileSink`
- `crates/orbit-engine/src/activity_job/tool_enforcement.rs`: `EnforcedAuditSink`
